---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest something to build
labels: feature-request
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the pain you're experiencing.

**What would you like ModelSentry to do?**
Describe the solution you want.

**How important is this to you?**
- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Important — affects my daily use
- [ ] Blocking — I can't use ModelSentry without this

**Any alternatives you've considered?**
Other ways you've worked around this problem.
